name: Breakfast Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef with the onions in a pan until browned.
2. Drain excess fat from the pan.
3. Add ground black pepper, cumin, and diced potatoes to the pan. Cook until heated through.
4. In a bowl, whisk eggs and milk together slightly.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the beef and potato mixture in the pan.
6. Stir gently to combine and cook as scrambled eggs.
7. Warm the flour tortillas on a hot griddle or skillet.
8. Spoon the egg and beef mixture onto each warmed tortilla.
9. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the filling.
10. Fold the sides of the tortilla inward, then roll tightly to form a burrito.
11. Serve with salsa of your choice.
